business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

positives: 31 years in business with 22 years of current management
Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
Zero claims across prior 3 years of insurance history
concerns: No written contracts with all subcontractors
LOC-007 (3250 Hill Avenue, Toledo) is not sprinklered
Building not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) not maintained
Plumbing system last updated in 2015 (oldest system)
Older properties in portfolio (LOC-004 built 1992, LOC-007 built 1998)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: No claims reported in the prior 3 years (2022-2024) across carriers Chubb, Hartford, and Liberty Mutual.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio. Portfolio consists of 9 locations totaling approximately 1,948,500 sq ft, including 6 warehouses, 2 manufacturing facilities, and 1 office. Hours of Operation: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring. 8 of 9 locations sprinklered. 24-hour doorperson or security on premises. However, MSDS are not maintained and lockout/tagout procedures are not in place.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Zero claims reported for years 2022, 2023, and 2024 with no cancellations. Carriers were Chubb Limited (2022), Hartford Financial Services (2023), and Liberty Mutual Insurance (2024).
